title: polystichum coniifolium
intro: Polystichum coniifolium, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of evergreen fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Polystichum coniifolium include improving respiratory function, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
